evidence: standards/enterprise/swiftui-production.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A temporary budget exception records the measured interaction, affected state and subtree, accountable owner, expiry, and remediation plan without weakening semantic Rules.
statement: SwiftUI Observation and rendering MUST expose the smallest useful state surface, bound invalidation and collection work, use lazy or paged rendering where scale requires it, and satisfy measured product-specific performance budgets.
